parts.text: Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 19.5 and longitude 75.3, field size is 2.5ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

To keep your field healthy, apply 119,162 liters on June 27th and 8,837 liters on June 28th. No further irrigation is needed through July 3rd due to beneficial rainfall. By following this precise schedule instead of a standard daily baseline, you have saved 922,000 liters of water, an efficiency gain of nearly 88%.

Advisory: This recommendation supplements, does not replace, local agricultural extension advice.
